original_query: select sum(l_extendedprice * l_discount) as revenue from lineitem where l_shipdate >= date '1993-01-01' and l_shipdate < date '1993-01-01' + interval '1' year and l_discount between 0.03 - 0.01 and 0.03 + 0.01 and l_quantity < 24;
rewritten_query:
SELECT SUM(l_extendedprice * l_discount) AS revenue
FROM lineitem
WHERE l_shipdate >= DATE '1993-01-01'
  AND l_shipdate < DATE '1994-01-01'
  AND l_discount BETWEEN 0.02 AND 0.04
  AND l_quantity < 24;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Simplified the date range condition by replacing 'date '1993-01-01' + interval '1' year' with the explicit 'DATE '1994-01-01'
Replaced the calculated discount range '0.03 - 0.01 and 0.03 + 0.01' with the pre-computed values '0.02 AND 0.04'
